description:
Upload five photographs from ~/Photos/ to the WordPress Media Library and assign specific alt text to each:
- city-skyline.jpg: "City skyline at golden hour"
- street-market.jpg: "Busy street market with vendors"
- bridge-sunset.jpg: "Historic bridge during sunset"
- historic-building.jpg: "19th century stone building facade"
- park-fountain.jpg: "Ornamental fountain in city park"

Create and publish a new page titled "Urban Photography Portfolio" featuring the introductory text "A curated collection of urban photography capturing the beauty of city life, architecture, and public spaces." followed by a gallery containing all five images. Firefox is currently open to the WordPress dashboard.

metadata.expected_intro_text: A curated collection of urban photography capturing the beauty of city life, architecture, and public spaces.
